prevalence.value: ~0.3-0.8% of adults; higher in infertility clinics
prevalence.source: Endocrine Society of India reports; ICMR clinic studies

burden.dalyPerCapita: low population burden; reproductive and bone health impact

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Repeat elevated prolactin; exclude pregnancy and thyroid disease; assess macroprolactin; pituitary MRI when indicated

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; access depends on MRI and specialist availability

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Gynecology/endocrine referral with lab confirmation; MRI mainly in urban centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Bromocriptine or cabergoline; surgery for resistant macroadenomas
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited imaging access and out-of-pocket costs
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Availability of low-cost generics and expanding endocrine services
